briefdescription.para: Configure haptic effect with 7 dB attenuation.
Configure haptic effect with 6 dB attenuation.
Configure haptic effect with 5 dB attenuation.
Configure haptic effect with 4 dB attenuation.
Configure haptic effect with 3 dB attenuation.
Configure haptic effect with 2 dB attenuation.
Configure haptic effect with 1 dB attenuation.
Configure haptic effect with no attenuation.
Attenuation options for GPIO-triggered haptic effects.
Playback from the pre-programmed ROM library.
Playback from custom haptics source programmed at runtime.
Playback from buzz source programmed at runtime.
Reserved for driver error handling.
Wavetable sources for haptic effects.
Custom haptics source at index 0.
Custom haptics source at index 1.
Maximum number of custom haptics effects.
Custom haptics source indices (0 or 1)

detaileddescription.para: Provide to cs40l5x_upload_pcm() or cs40l5x_upload_pwle() to specify index to upload custom haptics source.

briefdescription.para: Disable runtime logging for the device.
Enable runtime logging for the device.
Use to retrieve haptics logging status without updating.
Options for runtime haptics logging.

detaileddescription.para: Provide to cs40l5x_logger() to update runtime haptics logging.

briefdescription.para: Back EMF (SVC) in signed Q0.23 format (full scale is 24 V)
Boost voltage in unsigned Q0.24 format (full scale is 14 V)
Output voltage in signed Q0.23 format (full scale is 24 V)
Options for runtime haptics logging sources.

detaileddescription.para: Provide to cs40l5x_logger_get() to get runtime device characteristics.

briefdescription.para: Minimum value sampled for a logger source.
Maximum value sampled for a logger source.
Mean value sampled for a logger source.
Type specification for runtime haptics logging sources.

detaileddescription.para: Provide to cs40l5x_logger_get() to get minimum, mean, or maximum logged values.

briefdescription.para: Configure a rising-edge haptic effect.
Configure a falling-edge haptic effect.
Options for edge-triggered haptics effects.

detaileddescription.para: Provide to cs40l5x_configure_trigger() to specify the edge for haptic effects.

memberdef.definition: typedef struct device *(* cs40l5x_io_bus_get_device) (const struct device *const dev)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_io_bus_get_device

briefdescription.para: Return pointer to control port instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the haptic device instance

simplesect.para: Returns a pointer to the control port device structure

memberdef.definition: typedef bool(* cs40l5x_io_bus_is_ready) (const struct device *const dev)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_io_bus_is_ready

briefdescription.para: Function wrapper for i2c_is_ready_dt() or spi_is_ready_dt()

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the haptic device instance
control port is ready for use
control port is not ready for use

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* cs40l5x_io_bus_read) (const struct device *const dev, const uint32_t addr, uint32_t *const rx, const uint32_t len)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *const dev, const uint32_t addr, uint32_t *const rx, const uint32_t len)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_io_bus_read

briefdescription.para: Function wrapper for i2c_write_read_dt() or spi_read_dt()

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the haptic device instance
Starting register address
Pointer to unsigned 32-bit storage (value or array) to store read values
Number of registers to read

simplesect.para: a value from i2c_write_read_dt() or spi_read_dt()

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* cs40l5x_io_bus_write) (const struct device *const dev, uint32_t *const tx, const uint32_t len)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *const dev, uint32_t *const tx, const uint32_t len)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_io_bus_write

briefdescription.para: Function wrapper for i2c_write_dt() or spi_read_dt()

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the haptic device instance
Unsigned 32-bit array with the base register address followed by values to write
Pointer to unsigned 32-bit storage (value or array) to store read values

simplesect.para: a value from i2c_write_dt() or spi_write_dt()

briefdescription.para: Run calibration to derive ReDC and F0 values and apply results for click compensation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for haptic device instance
if success
if ReDC or F0 estimation times out
if a control port transaction fails
another error code on failure, resulting from PM action callback

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *const dev, const uint32_t frequency, const uint8_t level, const uint32_t duration)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_configure_buzz

briefdescription.para: Configure ROM buzz for haptic playback.

detaileddescription.para: With large amplitudes and insufficient power (e.g., in the case of internal boost configurations), it's possible to induce boost errors.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for haptic device instance
Frequency of haptic effect in Hz (default: 0xF0)
Amplitude of haptic effect, where UINT8_MAX is 100% (default: 0x1B)
Playback duration in milliseconds, where 0 is infinite duration (default: 0x32)
if success
if a control port transaction fails
another error code on failure, resulting from PM action callback

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *const dev, const struct gpio_dt_spec *const gpio, const enum cs40l5x_bank bank, const uint8_t index, const enum cs40l5x_attenuation attenuation, const enum cs40l5x_trigger_edge edge)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_configure_trigger

briefdescription.para: Configure edge-triggered haptic effect.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for haptic device instance
Pointer to the device structure for the GPIO used as the trigger source
Wavetable source for desired haptic effect, see cs40l5x_bank
Wavetable index for desired haptic effect
Attenuation in dB for desired haptic effect, see cs40l5x_attenuation
Specify edge (rising or falling) to trigger haptic effects
if success
if invalid wavetable source and index provided (e.g., index out of bounds)
if a control port transaction fails
another error code on failure, resulting from PM action callback

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *const dev, enum cs40l5x_logger logger_state)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_logger

briefdescription.para: Update runtime haptics logging and get current status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for haptic device instance
See cs40l5x_logger
if logging is enabled
if logging is disabled
if invalid wavetable source or trigger GPIO provided
if a control port transaction fails
another error code on failure, resulting from PM action callback

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *const dev, enum cs40l5x_logger_source source, enum cs40l5x_logger_source_type type, uint32_t *const value)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_logger_get

briefdescription.para: Get runtime haptics logging data for the specified logger source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for haptic device instance
See cs40l5x_logger_source
Unsigned 32-bit integer to store the retrieved data
See cs40l5x_logger_source_type
if success
if a control port transaction fails
another error code on failure, resulting from PM action callback

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *const dev, const enum cs40l5x_bank bank, const uint8_t index)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_select_output

briefdescription.para: Select haptic effect triggered via haptics_start_output()

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for haptic device instance
Wavetable source for desired haptic effect, see cs40l5x_bank
Wavetable index for desired haptic effect
if success
if invalid wavetable source and index provided (e.g., index out of bounds)

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *const dev, const uint8_t gain)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_set_gain

briefdescription.para: Configure gain for haptic effects triggered via haptics_start_output()

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for haptic device instance
Gain setting (valid values between 0 and 100)
if success
if provided gain is greater than 100%
if a control port transaction fails
another error code on failure, resulting from PM action callback

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *const dev, const enum cs40l5x_custom_index index, const uint16_t redc, const uint16_t f0, const int8_t *const samples, const uint16_t num_samples)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_upload_pcm

briefdescription.para: Upload PCM effect to the specified index.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for haptic device instance
See cs40l5x_custom_index
ReDC compensation in unsigned Q5.7 format | redc * (24 / 2.9)
F0 compensation in unsigned Q9.3 format | (f0 - 50) * 8
Array of signed 8-bit PCM samples
Number of PCM samples
if success
if invalid index provided (e.g., index out of bounds)
if a control port transaction fails
another error code on failure, resulting from PM action callback

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *const dev, const enum cs40l5x_custom_index index, const struct cs40l5x_pwle_section *const sections, const uint8_t num_sections)
memberdef.name: cs40l5x_upload_pwle

briefdescription.para: Upload PWLE effect to the specified index.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for haptic device instance
See cs40l5x_custom_index
Array of cs40l5x_pwle_section
Number of PWLE sections
if success
if invalid index provided (e.g., index out of bounds)
if a control port transaction fails
another error code on failure, resulting from PM action callback

briefdescription.para: CS40L5x Haptic Driver.
